page_metadata.biotools__summary: HARSH (HAplotype inference using Reference and Sequencing tecHnology) is a method to infer the haplotype using haplotype reference panel and high throughput sequencing data. It is based on a novel probabilistic model and Gibbs sampler method.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: HARSH (HAplotype inference using Reference and Sequencing tecHnology) is a method to infer the haplotype using haplotype reference panel and high throughput sequencing data. It is based on a novel probabilistic model and Gibbs sampler method.
